SEARCH
Package pl.AWTGameEngine.windows

Class HeadlessWindow

java.lang.Object
pl.AWTGameEngine.windows.HeadlessWindow
All Implemented Interfaces:
BaseWindow
public class HeadlessWindow extends Object implements BaseWindow
Headless window is provided for server builds and points to reduce of RAM usage. Variables are reduced to absolute minimum.
